entries.en: {entity:bottle} begins tipping toward screen right while resting on {entity:table}
the side of {entity:bottle} makes visible contact with {entity:table}
entries.zh_hans: {entity:bottle}的侧面与{entity:table}发生清晰可见的接触

entries.en: after rigid contact with {entity:table}, {entity:bottle} stops moving downward and transitions into a short roll
entries.zh_hans: {entity:bottle}与{entity:table}发生刚性接触后停止下落，并转为短距离滚动

entries.en: {entity:bottle} rolls a short distance across {entity:table} while the rolling speed visibly decreases
entries.zh_hans: {entity:bottle}在{entity:table}上短距离滚动，滚动速度明显减慢

entries.en: {entity:bottle} settles on {entity:table}, fully resting on one side, and remains still
entries.zh_hans: {entity:bottle}完全侧躺在{entity:table}上并停稳，随后保持静止

entries.en: a medium side view framing {entity:bottle} and the short roll path
entries.zh_hans: 中景侧视，将{entity:bottle}和短距离滚动范围纳入画面

entries.en: the camera does not translate or rotate
{entity:bottle} remains unobstructed within the center third of the frame
entries.zh_hans: {entity:bottle}始终无遮挡地位于画面中央三分之一范围内

entries.en: a medium side view that keeps {entity:bottle}, now settled, fully visible
entries.zh_hans: 保持中景侧视，完整呈现已静止的{entity:bottle}

entries.en: a brief hard-object impact sound is heard when {entity:bottle} visibly strikes {entity:table}
entries.zh_hans: 当{entity:bottle}与{entity:table}发生清晰可见的撞击时，传来一声短促的硬物碰撞声

entries.en: the silhouette and proportions of {entity:bottle} remain unchanged across the shot
entries.zh_hans: 整个镜头中，{entity:bottle}的轮廓和比例保持不变
